CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., AS PARENT COMPANY FOR AMERICA'S SERVICING COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed on January 30, 2012. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/CK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Continued To Mar-02-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARILYN YEE, TEL. NO. 1-800-991-7634 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. CASEY J. MCTIGUE OF SEVERSON & WERSON, TEL. NO. 677-5579 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE AND WAS NOT ARGUED. ATTY. YEE FAILED TO CONNECT THROUGH COURT CALL ON THE SECOND TIME THE MATTER WAS CALLED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., AS PARENT COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Sustained with ten days leave to amend. The opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/HEK)
